raw_consumer_statement:
Summary : Citibank closed my dispute without providing any written notice that additional information was required. I received no communication identifying what information was needed, and the dispute was marked Resolved without a reason code or written determination. Representatives gave conflicting explanations, including too much time has passed and that Citibank did not know about the new dispute. 

Details : I disputed a charge for merchandise that was materially misrepresented by the merchant. Citibank never sent me any written request for additional information or identified what information was needed. The only indication that more information may be needed was verbal, when I called Citibank to check the status. 

When I asked what information was needed, the representative could not tell me. I was never given notice or instructions, and no opportunity to provide what Citibank required. 

I later sent supporting documentation on my own initiative, including an independent appraisal showing misrepresentation. The dispute was then marked Resolved, which I understand to mean closed, without a written determination, reason code, or explanation of what information was missing. 

When I called to request the basis for the closure, representatives provided multiple conflicting explanations, including : too much time has passed, Citibank did not know about the new dispute. 

Multiple representatives stated both that the dispute is resolved and in investigation, which are contradictory statuses. No one was able to identify a reason code or the specific information Citibank believes was needed. 

I am requesting that Citibank : Reopen the dispute and conduct a reasonable investigation, or Provide a written determination including : reason code, closure date, and the information Citibank believes was missing. 

I am willing to provide all supporting documentation.
